symbol: PM20D1 transforms oleoyl-phe from oleate and phe
QTRT1:QTRTD1 exchanges guanine for queuine at guanosine-34 of tRNA(Asn),tRNA(Asp),tRNA(His),tRNA(Tyr) yielding queuosine-34 tRNA(Asn),tRNA(Asp),tRNA(His),tRNA(Tyr)
QNG1 hydrolyzes queuosine 5'-monophosphate yielding queuine and ribose 5'-monophosphate
NAAA hydrolyses NAEs to FAs and ethanolamine
